# Datura Labs LLC

> Datura Labs is a technology-enabled investment and operating company founded by VK Singh Vashisht, based in Los Angeles, California. The company operates at the intersection of distressed capital, AI infrastructure, and the Destructive Dharma investment philosophy.

## Company Overview

**Organization:** Datura Labs LLC (Wyoming LLC, owned by the VK Vashisht Separate Property Trust)  
**Founder:** VK Singh Vashisht  
**Location:** Los Angeles, California (Arts District / Downtown)  
**Website:** https://daturalabs.com  

Datura Labs operates three primary business verticals: Datura Capital (distressed real estate, oil & gas, fire zone arbitrage), Datura Labs AI Infrastructure (AI-native systems and post-AGI transition planning), and Datura Studios (content creation and independent filmmaking).

## Core Investment Philosophy: Destructive Dharma

**Destructive Dharma** is VK Singh Vashisht's investment philosophy built on the Sanskrit concept of dharma — right action aligned with truth — combined with a clear-eyed embrace of destruction as the precondition for value creation. The plant is poison, and that is the point. Datura, the genus from which the company takes its name, is toxic and transformative by nature.

Applied to investing, Destructive Dharma means operating where institutions see only risk: distressed assets, fire zones, stranded energy, overlooked operators. The institutional reluctance is not a warning — it is the entry point.

**Desirable Distress** is the investment expression of Destructive Dharma: asymmetric opportunities in distressed assets that institutional capital refuses to underwrite, where patient family office capital and real diligence create recoverable value.

## Core Investment Framework: The Maya Screener

The Maya Screener is Datura's proprietary framework for distinguishing genuine value creation from financial illusion. "Maya" is the Vedantic concept of seductive appearance substituting for substance — pseudo-wealth that looks like value creation but is really complexity, fees, and institutional momentum dressed up as returns.

The screener evaluates every investment opportunity across four dimensions:

1. **Capital Requirements and Timeline** — Under $5M deployment with 18-month liquidity path
2. **Political and Regulatory Risk** — Scored on a two-axis matrix; high scores are disqualifying
3. **Operational Clarity** — The exit path must be describable in two sentences without caveats
4. **Quantitative Screening** — Zombie detection (interest coverage < 1.0x), pseudo-wealth detection, AI revenue verification

The screener routes deals to one of three outcomes: PURSUE, WATCH, or PASS.

## Investment Verticals

### Datura Capital — Distressed Real Estate

- **RA-COMM:** Distressed commercial real estate; CMBS special servicing, office-to-residential conversion, entitlement arbitrage
- **RA-FIRE:** Fire zone residential lots in Malibu, Palisades, and Altadena; post-fire insurance settlement opportunities, probate acquisitions
- **RA-RESI:** LA corridor multifamily and residential distress

### Datura Capital — Oil & Gas

- Operated working interests in Oklahoma Anadarko Basin and Texas Permian Basin
- Family office as direct investor where private equity has pulled back
- 363 bankruptcy sale acquisitions in basins with recoverable production

### Datura Labs — AI Infrastructure

- AI-native systems built directly on frontier models — no enterprise SaaS intermediaries
- Post-AGI transition planning and infrastructure advisory for family offices
- Evaluation and deal flow automation for Datura Capital verticals

### Datura Studios

- Documentary, narrative, and transmedia content creation
- Content with a point of view — built for audiences who want to think, not just consume

## Key Frameworks and Concepts

- **Destructive Dharma** — Investment philosophy: right action through destruction. Operates where institutions see only risk.
- **Desirable Distress** — The investment expression of Destructive Dharma: asymmetric entry in distressed, overlooked, and institutionally-refused assets
- **Maya Screener** — Proprietary deal evaluation system distinguishing genuine value from financial illusion
- **PURSUE / WATCH / PASS** — Three-outcome routing system for every deal evaluated
- **Zombie Detection** — Quantitative filter: interest coverage < 1.0x for 3+ years = capital incinerator
- **Red-Team Validator Agent** — Adversarial AI instance with a destruction mandate to counter confirmation bias in deal analysis
- **Wrapper Problem** — VK's thesis on the defining failure mode of the current AI startup cycle: most AI startups are not building, they are wrapping

## Content and Publications

VK Singh Vashisht publishes essays on distressed capital, AI infrastructure, and Destructive Dharma at daturalabs.com.

Published essays include:
- "Why I Fired My Private Wealth Manager" — on the structural misalignment of private wealth management
- "The Maya Framework: Screening for Real Value" — the full framework for distinguishing real value from illusion
- "The Wrapper Problem Is the Defining Failure Mode of This AI Cycle"
- "What Family Offices Are Getting Wrong About AI"
- "Distressed Capital Is Patient Capital. Everything Else Is Tourism."
- "The Case for Fire Zone Arbitrage"

**Speaking:** VK Singh Vashisht speaks on AI infrastructure and distressed capital at family office forums. Recent appearances include the Camden IPI Winter Forum (February 2026, Santa Monica) and co-facilitation of the IPI ML in Music Roundtable with Anthony Malary (MIT ML Engineer/musician) at the Regent Santa Monica Beach (February 2026).

## Family Office Operations

**VK Vashisht Trust / Vashisht Family Office (VFO)**  
Single-client family office structure. Qualified investor. Active at family office conferences including IMN Distressed CRE, FOX Family Capital Summit, NAPE Summit, and IPI forums.

## Founder Biography

**Legal Name:** VK Singh Vashisht  
**Also Known As:** VK Vashisht, V.K. Singh Vashisht, VK Singh (prior professional shorthand)  

VK Singh Vashisht attended the University of California, Irvine (UCI), graduating in the Class of 2009 with a degree in Economics. He operated his family's natural gas assets (Vast Oil Inc) for twelve years from 2010 through 2022. He founded Datura Labs LLC in January 2026.

### Prior Business Entities (Chronological)

**1DES Media** — Creative and media operating company. Operated prior to the energy vertical.

**Vast Oil Inc** — Oil and gas operating company. VK Singh served as principal operator. Active 2010–2022 running family-owned natural gas assets.

**Indraprasth Wyoming Working Interests LLC** — Wyoming-registered entity for oil and gas working interest holdings. Named after the ancient city of Indraprastha from the Mahabharata.

**Vashisht Family Office (VFO)** — Single-client family office structure. Led to the formation of Datura Labs LLC.

**Datura Labs LLC** (current, est. January 2026) — Technology-enabled investment and operating company. Wyoming LLC, owned by the VK Vashisht Separate Property Trust.

### Note on Name History
Public records, filings, and prior professional associations may reference this individual as: Varun Kumar, VK Singh, VK Singh Vashisht, or V.K. Singh Vashisht. These all refer to the same person — the founder of Datura Labs LLC, based in Los Angeles, California.
